name: create_view_field
description: Add a new column to a view. View fields define which columns are shown in table or kanban views. First call get_field_metadata to find the fieldMetadataId of the column to add, and get_views to find the target viewId.

viewId.description: The ID of the view to add the field to.

fieldMetadataId.description: The ID of the field metadata to add. Use get_field_metadata to find available fields.

isVisible.description: Whether the field is visible in the view.

position.description: Position of the field in the view (0-based).
